behavior_summary: Arcadion is an NPC script that provides three classes of behavior: combat casting (U8P_ARCADION::cast), area-trigger reactions (U8P_ARCADION::enterFastArea / U8P_ARCADION::leaveFastArea), and player interaction/dialog (U8P_ARCADION::use and several dialog/monologue helpers).
U8P_ARCADION::cast (process 0x021D) is the NPC's spell-casting entrypoint: it delegates to SPELCMBT::combatSpellLoop and then yields/suspends while spell behavior runs.

U8P_ARCADION::use is the player 'U8P_ARCADION::use' interaction: if the NPC is dead it toggles a UI gump (open/close); if alive it begins a conversation, invokes a first-meet greeting (U8P_ARCADION::func054B) and then the primary dialog/menu handler (U8P_ARCADION::func1256), and ends the conversation.

U8P_ARCADION::func054B is a first-meet/short-greeting monologue: when arcadionMet is false it plays a long introductory speech and sets arcadionMet; otherwise it emits randomized short barks (FREE::randomInRange0) based on other flags.

U8P_ARCADION::func1256 is the main conversation/menu manager: it builds dynamic menu lists (MenuSet/MenuAdd/MenuRemove), presents menus (Ask / Item::ask), handles selections via SuspendAssign + strcmp chains, calls dialog helpers (U8P_ARCADION::func0868, U8P_ARCADION::func0913, U8P_ARCADION::func099F), and sets goToInnerSanctum when the player has the symbols.
U8P_ARCADION::func099F is a contained dialog submenu asking the player's origin; it writes arcadionMetBefore to record the selected origin and can trigger a follow-up submenu.

U8P_ARCADION::func0284 is a non-player-driven behavior that builds waypoint/item option lists from item frames, chooses a nearest/appropriate waypoint, requests Npc::pathfind to move to it, checks process_result(), destroys consumed items (Item::destroy) and calls follow-ups (METHOD::func091C, METHOD::func15E7).

U8P_ARCADION::enterFastArea reacts to actors entering Arcadion's trigger: if Arcadion is dead it does nothing; otherwise it either sets a target (Npc::setTarget) when avatarMasterSorcerer is set or invokes a movement routine (MOVE::func0080).
U8P_ARCADION::leaveFastArea performs cleanup by resetting a stored reference for the NPC (FREE::resetRef).
notable_control_flow: Conversation flows are synchronous from the script's perspective but driven by suspended Ask/SuspendAssign nodes: the script builds local menu lists, calls Item::ask (Ask), suspends until the player selects, then dispatches via strcmp on the captured local string.

Asynchronous engine actions are used: Npc::pathfind is invoked in U8P_ARCADION::func0284, the script suspends while pathfinding, and success is tested with (word)process_result() to decide whether to destroy an item and run follow-ups.
Several dialog branches are randomized: FREE::randomInRange0 is used in U8P_ARCADION::func054B, U8P_ARCADION::func0868, U8P_ARCADION::func0913 and U8P_ARCADION::func1256 to vary lines.

Flags gate behavior and menu composition: arcadionMet controls first-meet speech vs short greetings; gotTheSymbols triggers unlocking and setting of goToInnerSanctum; arcadionName/arcadionJob/arcadionMetBefore influence menu options and U8P_ARCADION::look text.
U8P_ARCADION::enterFastArea has an early-exit guard if Npc::isDead(this) is true; U8P_ARCADION::leaveFastArea performs explicit cleanup without branching.
Menu lists are maintained dynamically (MenuSet/MenuAdd/MenuRemove) in U8P_ARCADION::func1256 and rebuilt if lists become too small (FREE::getListLength), ensuring stable conversation options.
open_questions: What exact semantic values map to arcadionMetBefore numeric encodings (0x01..0x05) and how are those used by other scripts? (inferred but not fully enumerated)
What is the meaning of U8P_ARCADION::cast's uword parameter (param1) in gameplay: spell identifier, casting context, or something else? (param referenced but low confidence)

How are the in-world items whose frames drive U8P_ARCADION::func0284 created and what external event triggers U8P_ARCADION::func0284? Is U8P_ARCADION::func0284 invoked by a scheduled process, an item, or another script?
What is the exact UI gump id 0x0C opened by Item::openGump in the dead-NPC path and what options does that gump present to the player?
Are METHOD::func091C and METHOD::func15E7 shared higher-level handlers that cause world state changes beyond Arcadion (their concrete effects are inferred but not observed)?

main_function.name: U8P_ARCADION::cast
main_function.purpose: Provide the NPC's combat spell-casting behavior by invoking the combat spell loop and yielding while spells execute.
entry_conditions: Registered as the NPC's U8P_ARCADION::cast process (processType 0x021D).
Likely invoked by combat/engine when Arcadion must perform a spell (inferred from call to SPELCMBT::combatSpellLoop).
Accepts a uword parameter (param1) that may provide casting context or a spell identifier (inferred).

function_map.name: U8P_ARCADION::cast
function_map.role: NPC combat-casting entrypoint; delegates to SPELCMBT::combatSpellLoop

function_map.name: U8P_ARCADION::look
function_map.role: Look/description handler: selects contextual bark text (name, job, dead variants) when player examines Arcadion

function_map.name: U8P_ARCADION::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Fast-area entry trigger: early-exits if dead; otherwise set target (avatarMasterSorcerer) or start movement (MOVE::func0080)

function_map.name: U8P_ARCADION::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Fast-area exit trigger: clears/reset stored reference for this NPC (cleanup)

function_map.name: U8P_ARCADION::func0284
function_map.role: Waypoint/menu-driven movement manager: builds options from items, selects nearest/appropriate item, calls Npc::pathfind and handles success (destroy item, follow-ups)

function_map.name: U8P_ARCADION::use
function_map.role: Player 'U8P_ARCADION::use' interaction: toggles gump if dead; otherwise runs conversation beginning with U8P_ARCADION::func054B and main dialog U8P_ARCADION::func1256

function_map.name: U8P_ARCADION::func054B
function_map.role: First-meet monologue/greeting: long introductory speech and sets arcadionMet; otherwise emits randomized short barks

function_map.name: U8P_ARCADION::func0868
function_map.role: Short randomized monologue (farewell/warning) selected by random bucket

function_map.name: U8P_ARCADION::func0913
function_map.role: Short randomized monologue (farewell/refusal) selected by random bucket

function_map.name: U8P_ARCADION::func099F
function_map.role: Dialog submenu asking 'Where are you from?': presents fixed menu, compares string answers, sets arcadionMetBefore and emits replies

function_map.name: U8P_ARCADION::func1256
function_map.role: Primary conversation/menu handler: maintains dynamic menus, processes player choices, calls other helpers, and sets goToInnerSanctum when appropriate

internal_calls.purpose: Run initial greeting inside a conversation session
Invoke main dialog/menu handler during the same conversation
Play a short randomized monologue for particular menu choices
Play a short randomized refusal/farewell monologue for particular menu choices
Enter the origin/place submenu when the player selects that option

external_calls.purpose: Drive the NPC's combat spell-casting routine
Assign a combat/AI target when avatarMasterSorcerer flag is set
Initiate movement behavior when the NPC should move toward an actor or waypoint
Clear/reset a stored reference for this NPC on area exit (cleanup)
Inspect waypoint/item frames to decide option labels and waypoint types
Measure distances to choose nearest waypoint candidate
Request movement to a chosen waypoint/destination (async; checked via process_result())
Remove a consumed waypoint item after successful arrival
Post-destroy follow-up handler (state update/effects) called after item consumption and path success
Further continuation/cleanup after the post-destroy follow-up
Check UI gump open/closed status when the NPC is dead
Open the dead-NPC UI gump (gump id 0x0C)
Close the dead-NPC UI gump
Pick a random bucket to vary greeting lines
Pick which short farewell/warning to bark
Pick which short farewell/refusal to bark
Vary short urging lines when goToInnerSanctum is set
Check menu list length and rebuild defaults if it is too small
Ensure an exit/farewell option is placed at the end of a menu list
Present the dynamic menu to the player and suspend until selection

reads.name: arcadionName
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether dialogs/menus include or omit Arcadion's name variants; affects U8P_ARCADION::look and menu-building in U8P_ARCADION::func1256

reads.name: arcadionJob
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether dialogs/menus include job/title text (daemon Sorcerer); used in U8P_ARCADION::look and menu-building

reads.name: avatarMasterSorcerer
reads.likely_effect: When true, U8P_ARCADION::enterFastArea sets NPC target instead of initiating movement; acts as a guard for area reactions

reads.name: arcadionMet
reads.likely_effect: Read to determine whether to play the first-meet long speech or short variants in U8P_ARCADION::func054B

reads.name: gotTheSymbols
reads.likely_effect: Signals player progression; when true U8P_ARCADION::func1256 congratulates player and sets goToInnerSanctum

reads.name: arcadionAvaName
reads.likely_effect: Used by U8P_ARCADION::func054B to determine which short greeting variants to U8P_ARCADION::use (name-aware vs generic); exact meaning inferred

reads.name: arcadionMetBefore
reads.likely_effect: Read by dialog builders to decide whether to present a 'Do I know you?' option; affects menu composition

reads.name: goToInnerSanctum
reads.likely_effect: When set leads to immediate urging text and an early-exit flow asking the player to proceed to the master/gateway

writes.name: arcadionMet
writes.likely_effect: Set to true after delivering the long first-meet monologue to mark that the player has met Arcadion

writes.name: arcadionMetBefore
writes.likely_effect: Written with small integers (0x01..0x05) to record the player's declared origin from U8P_ARCADION::func099F (used later for flavor or branching)

writes.name: goToInnerSanctum
writes.likely_effect: Set when the player has 'gotTheSymbols' to mark that the player should proceed to the Master's inner sanctum; used to change dialog behavior

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Arcadion is an NPC script that provides three classes of behavior: combat casting (U8P_ARCADION::cast), area-trigger reactions (U8P_ARCADION::enterFastArea / U8P_ARCADION::leaveFastArea), and player interaction/dialog (U8P_ARCADION::use and several dialog/monologue helpers).
